title: The Egghead Incident Begins
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, Kid, Unknown person #8, Saturn, Unknown person #9 as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Deep within lab

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Need F-FOODO OOD...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We haven't had a decent meal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In over two months...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder... if we'll ever be allowed to leave...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are we gonna die here...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two months back, when we were meant to set sail...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: After our inspection of egghead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those weaponized sea beasts attacked us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we were brought back to the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, all the other agents that came to look into our disap- pearance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: met the same fate too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, I figured... YOU were the one behind it all...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: DR. VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: JANGLE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sorry.. I'm afraid I had no idea..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TO THINK THIS WAS HAPPENING ON EGGHEAD RIGHT UNDER MY NOSE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How troubling...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This whole affair has been baffling from the start.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: WORD LEAKING TO THE GOVERNMENT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ABOUT OUR RESEARCH INTO THE PONEGLYHS SHOULDIVE BEEN IMPOSSIBLE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy has successfully deployed from Branch G-9.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have over 100 ships of all sizes en route...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Zizk...!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: ...All heading for Egghead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Under- stood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A BAR AT A SMALL PORT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take me with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On a certain island in the new world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take me with you! Take me! Come on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't be dumb! There's no way...

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: ...I'd bring a hot-headed kid like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hamp!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you give it up? You'll make all the other captains jealous...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way! I really look up to the chief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Boss!! That bastard's actually attacking us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So far they've just been scraping with our youngsters, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What d'ya wanna do? Seems like it'll turn into a full-on battle soon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dunno whether you'd call this good or bad timing... we were just about to set off...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
